name: fall-town-detective
description: Fall Town Detective RPG - 100-level anime mystery game

scripts.build: echo 'Web app ready in www/ directory'
scripts.build:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.build:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npx cap sync && npm run build:android && npm run build:ios
